message:
🐛 Fix demo mode data loading and remove redundant refresh icon (#441)

- Fix usePods, usePodIssues, and useDeploymentIssues to allow demo-token
  through to MSW interception instead of returning early with empty data
- Remove small refresh icon from card title area (redundant with refresh
  button spinner on right side of card header)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
